title: An International Experience Canada participant needs a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## You’re 18 to 35 and  want to travel and work under International Experience Canada (IEC)
You may be eligible for a work permit under one or  more of International IEC’s 3 categories:
- Working Holiday ( open work permit (opens in a new tab) ) Leave the employer section of the application blank when you apply for your open work permit
- Leave the employer section of the application blank when you apply for your open work permit
- International Co-op (Internship) ( employer-specific work permit (opens in a new tab) )
- Young Professionals (employer-specific work permit)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
